name: Everything’s good cat Sticker
description: Decorate and personalize laptops, water bottles, and more. Removable, kiss-cut vinyl stickers. Super durable and water-resistant. 1/8 inch (3.2mm) white border around each design. Matte finish. For orders with 2+ small stickers, they will be printed in pairs with two stickers on one sheet to reduce sheet waste. Since every item is made just for you by your local third-party fulfiller, there may be slight variances in the product received
